meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for bridge — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly. Only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: 1. Cross-Chain Replay Attacks
cards.detect: Bridge messages or signatures don't include sufficient context (chain ID, contract address, nonce) to prevent replay...
check: VERIFY: Bridge messages or signatures don't include sufficient context (chain ID, contract address, nonce) to prevent replay...
ANTIPATTERN: No contract address in replay protection
cards.antipattern: No contract address in replay protection

cards.title: 2. Signature Validation Issues
cards.detect: No signature length validation
check: VERIFY: No signature length validation

cards.title: 3. Token Bridging Issues
cards.detect: Doesn't account for transfer fees
check: VERIFY: Doesn't account for transfer fees

cards.title: 4. Sequencer & L2 Specific Issues
cards.detect: Blocked when sequencer down
check: VERIFY: Blocked when sequencer down

cards.title: 5. Access Control Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Approval persists after bridging
check: VERIFY: Approval persists after bridging

cards.title: 6. Slippage & MEV Issues
cards.detect: No minimum output
check: ANTIPATTERN: Price can change during bridge delay
cards.antipattern: Price can change during bridge delay

cards.title: 7. Message Ordering & Timing
cards.detect: Assumes message order
check: VERIFY: Assumes message order
ANTIPATTERN: Assumes message order

cards.title: 1. Zero-Hash Trusted Root — Message Proof Bypass
cards.detect: During a routine upgrade, the Nomad Replica contract was initialized with a trusted root of `0x00` (zero hash).
check: VERIFY: During a routine upgrade, the Nomad Replica contract was initialized with a trusted root of `0x00` (zero hash).
ANTIPATTERN: Replica initialized with trusted root = 0x00

cards.title: 2. Native Token Deposit Fakery — address(0) Whitelisting
cards.detect: Qubit's QBridge mapped the ETH `resourceID` to `address(0)` in the deposit handler, and `address(0)` was whitelisted in `contractWhitelist`.
check: VERIFY: Qubit's QBridge mapped the ETH `resourceID` to `address(0)` in the deposit handler, and `address(0)` was whitelisted in `contractWhitelist`.
ANTIPATTERN: address(0) whitelisted + no msg.value validation for native deposits
cards.antipattern: address(0) whitelisted + no msg.value validation for native deposits

cards.title: 3. Native Token Wrapping Bypass
cards.detect: Bridge deposit handlers that support both native tokens (ETH/BNB) and ERC20 tokens must correctly enforce that...
check: VERIFY: Bridge deposit handlers that support both native tokens (ETH/BNB) and ERC20 tokens must correctly enforce that...
ANTIPATTERN: Chainbridge fork deposit handler doesn't enforce msg.value
cards.antipattern: Chainbridge fork deposit handler doesn't enforce msg.value

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: Bridge and cross-chain vulnerabilities differ from standard DeFi exploits because they span multiple execution...
check: VERIFY: Bridge and cross-chain vulnerabilities differ from standard DeFi exploits because they span multiple execution...

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Severity**: 🔴 CRITICAL | **Loss**: 20M OP (~$15M) | **Protocol**: Optimism/Wintermute | **Chain**: Optimism
check: VERIFY: Severity**: 🔴 CRITICAL | **Loss**: 20M OP (~$15M) | **Protocol**: Optimism/Wintermute | **Chain**: Optimism
ANTIPATTERN: while (childcontract != TARGET) {

cards.title: DeFiHackLabs Bridge Exploit Patterns Compendium
cards.detect: EthCrossChainManager can execute on ANY target contract
check: VERIFY: EthCrossChainManager can execute on ANY target contract
ANTIPATTERN: Signature verification doesn't include chain-specific nonce
cards.antipattern: Signature verification doesn't include chain-specific nonce
cards.securePattern: Restrict which contracts can be called via cross-chain messages

cards.title: 1. ISM Validation Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Contracts that receive Hyperlane messages fail to configure or validate the ISM properly, allowing arbitrary message...
check: VERIFY: Contracts that receive Hyperlane messages fail to configure or validate the ISM properly, allowing arbitrary message...
ANTIPATTERN: Always returns true
cards.securePattern: Deploy with MultisigISM for strong security

cards.title: 2. Message Replay Attacks
cards.detect: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed.
check: VERIFY: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed.
ANTIPATTERN: State changed before potential revert

cards.title: 3. Router Configuration Issues
cards.detect: Any sender accepted
check: ANTIPATTERN: Wrong address format comparison

cards.title: 4. Handle Function Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: State change after external call
check: VERIFY: State change after external call
cards.securePattern: Proper access control and reentrancy protection

cards.title: 5. Gas Payment Issues
cards.detect: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient
check: VERIFY: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient

cards.title: 1. Channel Blocking Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Protocols inherit from `LzApp` without implementing the non-blocking pattern (`NonblockingLzApp`), or they implement it...
check: VERIFY: Protocols inherit from `LzApp` without implementing the non-blocking pattern (`NonblockingLzApp`), or they implement it...
ANTIPATTERN: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper
cards.antipattern: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper

cards.title: 2. Minimum Gas Validation Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Protocols allow users to specify arbitrary `adapterParams` without validating the gas limit meets minimum requirements...
check: VERIFY: Protocols allow users to specify arbitrary `adapterParams` without validating the gas limit meets minimum requirements...
ANTIPATTERN: User controls gas amount without validation
cards.antipattern: User controls gas amount without validation

cards.title: 3. Gas Estimation & Fee Calculation
cards.detect: Uses source chain gas config for destination
check: VERIFY: Uses source chain gas config for destination
ANTIPATTERN: Fee estimation uses different payload than actual send
cards.antipattern: Fee estimation uses different payload than actual send

cards.title: 4. Fee Refund Handling
cards.detect: Contract cannot receive refunds
check: VERIFY: Contract cannot receive refunds
ANTIPATTERN: Refunds go to contract, not user
cards.antipattern: Refunds go to contract, not user

cards.title: 5. Payload Size & Address Validation
cards.detect: No limit on _toAddress length
check: VERIFY: No limit on _toAddress length

cards.title: 6. Composed Message Vulnerabilities (LayerZero V2)
cards.detect: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are...
check: VERIFY: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are...
ANTIPATTERN: Rejects compose when user sends with compose option
cards.antipattern: Rejects compose when user sends with compose option
cards.securePattern: Prevent users from sending with compose if not supported

cards.title: 7. OFT/ONFT Specific Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains
check: VERIFY: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains
ANTIPATTERN: Event building after _creditTill can run out of gas
cards.antipattern: Event building after _creditTill can run out of gas
cards.securePattern: Assert no ZRO fee when paying in native

cards.title: 8. Peer & Trust Configuration Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Uses sender address if peer not configured
check: VERIFY: Uses sender address if peer not configured
cards.antipattern: Uses sender address if peer not configured

cards.title: 9. Stargate/sgReceive Integration Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Complex operations can run out of gas
check: VERIFY: Complex operations can run out of gas
ANTIPATTERN: Sends to msg.sender instead of destination contract
cards.antipattern: Sends to msg.sender instead of destination contract
cards.securePattern: Explicit gas limit ensures catch block executes

cards.title: 10. Cross-Chain Payload Validation Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: tapSendData.tapOftAddress not validated
check: VERIFY: tapSendData.tapOftAddress not validated
ANTIPATTERN: Debits from msg.sender instead of 'from'
cards.securePattern: Validate tapOftAddress is the expected token

cards.title: 11. Insufficient Gas Limit Calculation
cards.detect: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting
check: VERIFY: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting
ANTIPATTERN: MIN_FALLBACK_RESERVE doesn't cover all overhead
cards.securePattern: Let users specify higher gas if needed

cards.title: 1. VAA Parsing Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Protocols either use outdated/deprecated Wormhole methods for VAA parsing, fail to validate all VAA fields properly, or...
check: VERIFY: Protocols either use outdated/deprecated Wormhole methods for VAA parsing, fail to validate all VAA fields properly, or...
ANTIPATTERN: Sequence tracking not per-emitter

cards.title: 2. Guardian Set Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Protocols don't account for guardian set transitions properly.
check: VERIFY: Protocols don't account for guardian set transitions properly.
ANTIPATTERN: Doesn't track which guardian set signed
cards.antipattern: Doesn't track which guardian set signed
cards.securePattern: Track guardian set for governance actions

cards.title: 3. Message Replay Attacks
cards.detect: Same VAA can be replayed across instances
check: VERIFY: Same VAA can be replayed across instances
cards.antipattern: Same VAA can be replayed across instances

cards.title: 4. Token Bridge Integration
cards.detect: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly
check: VERIFY: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly
ANTIPATTERN: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly

cards.title: 5. Gas Limit Issues
cards.detect: Gas limit cannot be updated
check: VERIFY: Gas limit cannot be updated
